title: amaryllis × mutabolis
intro: Amaryllis × hollandica, commonly known as the Dutch hyacinth or amaryllis × mutabilis, is a hybrid of the amaryllis plant, known for its vibrant and colorful blooms. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Amaryllis × hollandica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Amaryllis × hollandica can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and health.
